connectGithub.title: Connect GitHub
connectGithub.description: Release Hub needs access to your GitHub account to detect merged pull requests and build releases. This connection is required to continue.
connectGithub.note: You will be redirected to GitHub to authorize the app.

selectRepo.title: Select a repository
selectRepo.description: Choose the GitHub repository you want to track releases for.
selectRepo.createError: Could not create project. Please try again.
selectRepo.connectionError: We couldn't load your repositories — your GitHub authorization is no longer valid. Reconnect to continue.
